records.ety: [F. pensif, fr. penser to think, fr. L. pensare to weigh, ponder, consider, v. intens. fr. pendere to weigh. See Pension, Poise.]

defs: Thoughtful, sober, or sad; employed in serious reflection; given to, or favorable to, earnest or melancholy musing.
quotes: The pensive secrecy of desert cell.
Anxious cares the pensive nymph oppressed.

defs: Expressing or suggesting thoughtfulness with sadness; as, pensive numbers.
